use_cases: Display user profile images with automatic fallback to initials
Show team member avatars in organizational charts
Render author bylines for blog posts and articles
Create notification badges with user avatars
Build testimonial cards with speaker profile images
ai_summary: A composite Avatar component system built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images with graceful fallback to initials or text. Part of a card studio collection, this component provides accessible, keyboard-navigable avatar functionality with customizable styling via Tailwind CSS.
